scripts.build: dotnet publish .. -r wasi-wasm -c Release && npm run transpile
scripts.transpile: jco transpile slice-workers-sample.wasm -o component --name slice-workers-sample --tla-compat --no-namespaced-exports --instantiation async --map 'wasi:sockets/tcp@0.2.0=../stubs/tcp.js' && npx wasm-opt -Oz component/slice-workers-sample.core.wasm -o component/slice-workers-sample.core.wasm && node generate-module-map.mjs
